# Copilot Repository Instructions

## Language Rules

- `README.md` MUST be written in English.
- `README_ja.md` MUST be written in Japanese.
- All documentation MUST be created in both Japanese (`*_ja.md`) and English (`*.md`).

## Specification Rules

- Full specifications are at `docs/full-specs/spec.md` (English) and `docs/full-specs/spec_ja.md` (Japanese).
- When making any functional change, ALWAYS update both spec files to reflect the latest state.
- The spec files MUST always describe the current implementation, not outdated approaches.
